---
title: 'Effectiveness of a COVID-19 testing outreach intervention for Latinx communities: a cluster randomized trial'
date: '2022-01-01'
author: [David S DeGarmo, Stephanie De Anda, Camille C Cioffi, Hannah F Tavalire, Jake Searcy, Elizabeth L Budd, Ellen Hawley McWhirter, Anne Marie Mauricio, Sven Halvorson, Emily A Beck, others]
publication: JAMA Network Open, **6**, _e2216796_ (2022).
categories: [health,justice]
url_source: 'https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/fullarticle/2793483'
url_preprint: ''
journ: JAMA Network Open
issue: 6
page: "e2216796"
year: 2022
image: ''
pub_number: 6
---
